name: clawness
description: Lightweight, extensible rule-retrieval harness for Claude Code.

plugins.name: clawness
plugins.description: 106 rules across 15 domains (Go, Rust, Java, SQL, bash, CSS, Docker, Python, TS, React, Next.js, FastAPI, Capacitor + cross-cutting general rules). Per-prompt rule injection via BM25 + TF-IDF + concept expansion, with optional model2vec semantic embeddings. Adversarial sub-agents (security red/blue team, code critic, test writer, perf auditor, refactor advisor, architecture challenger), slash commands, Bash-output compression, and an opt-in plan-approval gate. No Docker, no services.
